queries.name: Most recent PR address
queries.description: Get the most recent Primary address record for each person in SPRADDR

columns.name: SPRADDR_PIDM
columns.description: Internal ID.

columns.name: SPRADDR_ATYP_CODE
columns.description: Address Type code. Most common values are PR - Primary, MA - Mailing.

columns.name: SPRADDR_SEQNO
columns.description: Sequence Number

columns.name: SPRADDR_FROM_DATE
columns.description: This field maintains the effective start date of address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_TO_DATE
columns.description: This field maintains the effective end date of address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STREET_LINE1
columns.description: This field maintains the first line of the address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STREET_LINE2
columns.description: This field maintains the second line of the address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STREET_LINE3
columns.description: This field maintains the third line of the address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CITY
columns.description: This field maintains the city associated with the address of person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STAT_CODE
columns.description: State associated with the address record.

columns.name: SPRADDR_ZIP
columns.description: This field maintains the zip code associated with the address of person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CNTY_CODE
columns.description: County code, 5 characters.

columns.name: SPRADDR_NATN_CODE
columns.description: This field maintains the nation/country associated with the address of person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_PHONE_AREA
columns.description: Area code of the address. Our definition table is blank.

columns.name: SPRADDR_PHONE_NUMBER
columns.description: Phone number associated with this address. If you want a phone number though, use SPRTELE. This field is rarely populated.

columns.name: SPRADDR_PHONE_EXT
columns.description: This field maintains the extension of the phone number associated with address of person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STATUS_IND
columns.description: This field identifies if address information is inactive. Valid value is I - Inactive, NULL = active, like SPRIDEN.

columns.name: SPRADDR_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field defines the most current date a record is added or changed.

columns.name: SPRADDR_USER
columns.description: The Id for the User who created or last updated the record.

columns.name: SPRADDR_ASRC_CODE
columns.description: Address source code.

columns.name: SPRADDR_DELIVERY_POINT
columns.description: This field is used to designate the delivery point for mail as established by the Postal Service.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CORRECTION_DIGIT
columns.description: The Correction Digit field is defined by the Postal Service and is used to determine the digits used for delivery related to the ZIP code.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CARRIER_ROUTE
columns.description: The addresses to which a carrier delivers mail. In common usage, carrier route includes city routes, rural routes, highway contract routes, post office box sections, and general delivery units.

columns.name: SPRADDR_GST_TAX_ID
columns.description: Goods and Services Tax Identification of vendor at this address

columns.name: SPRADDR_REVIEWED_IND
columns.description: Verification the address has been validated.

columns.name: SPRADDR_REVIEWED_USER
columns.description: User who reviewed and validated the address.

columns.name: SPRADDR_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: Source system that generated the data

columns.name: SPRADDR_CTRY_CODE_PHONE
columns.description: Telephone code that designates the region and country.

columns.name: SPRADDR_HOUSE_NUMBER
columns.description: Building or lot number on a street or in an area.

columns.name: SPRADDR_STREET_LINE4
columns.description: This field maintains the fourth line of the address associated with person.

columns.name: SPRADDR_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SPRADDR_VERSION
columns.description: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SPRADDR_USER_ID
columns.description: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SPRADDR_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SPRADDR_GUID
columns.description: Stores the global unique identifier for a address object.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CNTY_CODE_ISO
columns.description: ISO code for County.

columns.name: SPRADDR_CNTY_TITLE
columns.description: Title for County.

columns.name: SPRADDR_ADDR_EXT_VERIFIED_CDE
columns.description: Y indicates the address has been verified by the Person Manager address verification integration service.
